basic_details.job_title: HPNLU Shimla Research Associates of Law Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh National Law University Shimla (HPNLU Shimla)
basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh National Law University Shimla (HPNLU Shimla) Research Associates of Law Notification 2026 has been released on 30 May 2026 on the official website www.hpnlu.ac.in. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the HPNLU Shimla Research Associates of Law Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Essential Qualifications, Experience and other eligibility conditions shall be the same as those of an Assistant Professor as per the norms prescribed by the UGC Regulations, 2018.
qualification.details: Essential Qualifications, Experience and other eligibility conditions shall be the same as those of an Assistant Professor as per the norms prescribed by the UGC Regulations, 2018.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HPNLU Shimla to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download HPNLU Shimla Research Associates of Law Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HPNLU Shimla Research Associates of Law recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the HPNLU Shimla Research Associates of Law recruitment is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associates of Law?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the post of Research Associates of Law in the Himachal Pradesh National Law University Shimla.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 3000/-. Please check the official notification for details on other categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associates of Law position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Associates of Law position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the HPNLU Shimla Research Associates of Law recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. When does the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the HPNLU Shimla Research Associates of Law recruitment begins on 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associates of Law posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associates of Law posts will be based on an Interview conducted in a Hybrid Mode.

faq.question: Q8. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: The essential qualifications, experience, and other eligibility conditions are the same as those of an Assistant Professor as per UGC Regulations, 2018.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Research Associates of Law posts is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
